prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-11FTCHSSKFSO-3PC-11I-ORNG Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 11" Fixed Blade Survival Serrated Paracord Knife and Fire Starter, Orange Description: The ASR Outdoor 11" Full Tang Survival Hunting Knife with Fire Stick Fire Starter Magnesium Tool is a great addition to your arsenal of camping gear, survival kits, bug out bags, hiking backpacks or emergency preparedness items and more. This is a great every day carry EDC item to store in your car in case of emergency as well.

This two-in-one knife and fire starter with carrier sheath is a must-have tool for its dual purpose functionality, its quality materials that will last you many outdoor seasons and projects to come and, a bonus fire starter that is paramount to have if you're planning any kind of expedition into the great outdoors. Measuring only 9" in length, the knife is easy to maneuver, clean and pack with you, either on your belt, backpack or as part of your hunting, hiking, trekking or camping gear.

Never be unprepared with the ASR Outdoor 11" Full Tang Survival Hunting Knife with Fire Stick Fire Starter Magnesium Tool as part of your survival kit or camping gear. Keep it stored safely in the included nylon sheath when not in use to avoid injury. Search Terms: serrated knife camping knife hunting knife fixed blade hunting knives camping accessories camping gear camping supplies camping gear must haves pocket knives tactical knives pocket knives and folding knives 550 paracord tanto knife survival gear Features: - Length: 11" | Blade Material: 440 Steel - Paracord Wrapped Handle | Nylon Sheath w/ Belt Loop - Magnesium Rod Fire Starter - Serrated Spine | Tanto Point - Handle Color: Orange === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
